apiPool.title: API Management
apiPool.description: Manage proxy models in one place with import and manual backfill (Shift+Click: enable/disable all, Ctrl+Click: pin to top).
apiPool.empty: No API entries yet. Add a channel and select models first.
apiPool.search: Search by model / display name / channel
apiPool.modelPlaceholder: Enter model name, e.g. gpt-4o, claude-3.5-sonnet
apiPool.displayNamePlaceholder: Leave empty to use model name
apiPool.noImportableModels: No importable models are available yet. Fetch channel models first.

testChat.title: Test Chat
testChat.placeholder: Enter a message to start testing...

validation.title: Key Validation
validation.description: When enabled, all requests must carry a valid Access Key

apiPool.deleteDesc: Delete {{name}}? This model will be removed from API management.
apiPool.keyWarning: The secret key will only be shown once. Keep it safe.

channel.title: Channels
channel.description: Manage upstream channels, model sync, testing and configuration
channel.search: Search by name / type / Base URL / notes
channel.name: Channel Name
channel.enabledDesc: When disabled, this channel won't be used for model sync and forwarding
channel.testDesc: Test whether this channel can fetch models and connect to upstream
channel.poolSyncDesc: Selected models will be synced to the API pool. Unchecking will remove them from the pool.
channel.poolSyncEmpty: No models synced to API pool

models.title: Available Models ({{count}})
models.empty: Click the button above to fetch available models

channel.typeChangeDisabled: Channel type cannot be changed in edit mode
channel.deleteConfirm: Delete channel {{name}}? Associated API pool entries will also be removed.

token.title: Access Keys
token.name: Key Name

validation.title: Key Validation
validation.description: When enabled, all requests must carry a valid Access Key

token.keyWarning: The secret key will only be shown once. Keep it safe.

translator.title: Desktop Translation Relay
translator.description: Translate text on the desktop side and forward the translated result to the Web Admin port.
translator.sourcePlaceholder: Type text here. The translated result will be forwarded to the Web port.
translator.relayed: Translated content forwarded to Web Admin
translator.webDescription: This view shows the latest translated payload received from the desktop side.
translator.empty: No translated content has been forwarded yet.

relayPanel.title: Translation Relay
relayPanel.description: Initiate translation on desktop and sync the latest result to the Web display.
relayPanel.submitDescription: Enter the original text and click Translate. The target language defaults to zh.
relayPanel.resultDescription: After submission, the returned result and sync status will be displayed.
relayPanel.success: Translation succeeded, result synced to Web display.

viewPanel.title: Translation Display
viewPanel.empty: No translated content has been forwarded yet.

security.title: Security
security.forceKeyDesc: When enabled, all API requests must include a valid Access Key, otherwise returns 401

circuit.title: Circuit Breaker
circuit.connectTimeoutDesc: Timeout for proxy connections to upstream APIs. Restart proxy to apply changes.
circuit.disableDesc: Immediately return error without retry or circuit-break. Supports single codes or ranges (inclusive), comma-separated
circuit.retryDesc: Failover to next provider on these status codes. Supports single codes or ranges (inclusive), comma-separated; 504 and 524 are never retried regardless
circuit.disableKeywordsDesc: Automatically disable the current API entry when upstream error contains any keyword (case-insensitive), one per line

webAdmin.title: Web Admin
webAdmin.enabledDesc: Start the HTTP management interface when credentials are configured.
webAdmin.singlePortDesc: Use the same port as the proxy for single-port mode, or keep 9099 for a separate admin port.

general.title: General
general.defaultGroupDesc: Remember the default API Management group to open in the UI
general.defaultSortModeDesc: Default model sort order for the API Management page

step1.title: Never Goes Down
step1.desc: Set model to auto to match the best channel automatically; when using a specific model and the channel fails, it falls back to an available one — zero downtime guaranteed

step2.title: Add Channels
step2.desc: Go to「Channels」to add your API providers, then fetch and select the models you need

step3.title: Enable Models
step3.desc: In「API Mgmt」, enable the model entries you want to include in routing

step4.title: Start Using
step4.desc: Proxy is auto-started. Point your client to http://127.0.0.1:9090, set model to auto or any specific name, no API Key needed
